info.title: GenRTL Public API
info.description: The GenRTL Public API provides programmatic access to library documentation and search functionality. Get up-to-date documentation and code examples for any library.

get.description: Search for libraries by name with intelligent LLM-powered ranking based on your query context.

results.title: React
results.description: A JavaScript library for building user interfaces

get.description: Retrieve full usage metrics for a library: cumulative and daily request counters broken down by surface (web page, text docs, MCP, CLI), MCP client daily unique-user breakdown, and lifetime topic and country distributions. The API key must belong to a member of the teamspace that owns the library — claim ownership from the library's admin page on genrtl.com.
Retrieve intelligent, LLM-reranked documentation context for natural language queries. Returns the most relevant code snippets and documentation for your specific question.

codeSnippets.codeDescription: Shows how to implement authentication checks in Next.js middleware

infoSnippets.content: Middleware allows you to run code before a request is completed...

text/plain.example:
### Middleware Authentication Example

Source: https://github.com/vercel/next.js/blob/canary/docs/middleware.mdx

Shows how to implement authentication checks in Next.js middleware

```typescript
import { NextResponse } from 'next/server'
...
```

post.description: Trigger a refresh of an existing library to fetch the latest documentation. Library owners have dedicated refresh limits.

libraryName.description: Library identifier — the URL path of the library on genrtl.com. Use `/owner/repo` for GitHub repositories (e.g., `/vercel/next.js`), or `/<source>/<id>` for other sources (e.g., `/websites/uploadcare_com`, `/llmstxt/<source>`). See [Library ID format](/api-guide#library-id-format).

gitToken.description: Optional Git access token for refreshing private repositories. If not provided, the stored OAuth token will be used.

get.description: Retrieve the current policy configuration for the teamspace associated with the API key. Includes source type access settings and public repository filters.

patch.description: Incrementally update policy configuration for the teamspace associated with the API key. Only the fields you include in the request body are modified — omitted fields remain unchanged. For source types, use `enable`/`disable` arrays (both allowed if no overlap). For library lists, use `add`/`remove` objects or `clear: true` to remove all. Requires owner or admin role. All field names use camelCase.

blockLibrary.summary: Add a library to the blocked list

blockDomain.summary: Block all libraries from a domain

exceptLibrary.summary: Add a library exception (bypasses all filters)

allowDomain.summary: Allow libraries from a specific domain (select mode)

post.description: Submit a GitHub repository for documentation processing. Supports private repos via a gitToken or by connecting your GitHub account at https://genrtl.com/add-library.
Submit a GitLab repository for documentation processing. Supports private repos via a gitToken or by connecting your GitLab account at https://genrtl.com/add-library.
Submit a Bitbucket repository for documentation processing. Supports private repos via a gitToken or by connecting your Bitbucket account at https://genrtl.com/add-library.

Submit a repository from any Git provider not covered by the dedicated GitHub, GitLab, or Bitbucket endpoints. Supports Gitea, Forgejo, Codeberg, self-hosted GitLab, and other Git servers. For private repos, provide a personal access token via the gitToken field.

gitToken.description: Personal access token for private repositories

skipVersionFiltering.description: Skip filtering out version-specific documentation pages

post.summary: Add an OpenAPI specification by URL
post.description: Submit an OpenAPI specification URL for documentation processing.

openApiUrl.description: URL pointing to an OpenAPI specification (JSON or YAML)

post.description: Upload an OpenAPI specification file (JSON or YAML) for documentation processing. Requires a team project. File size limit is 10MB.
Submit an llms.txt file URL for documentation processing.

llmstxtUrl.description: URL pointing to an llms.txt, llms-full.txt, or llms-small.txt file

post.description: Submit a website URL for documentation processing.

websiteBaseUrl.description: Base URL to limit crawling scope. Only pages starting with this URL will be indexed.

post.description: Submit a Confluence space for documentation processing. Requires a connected Confluence account and a team project. You can optionally specify specific page IDs to index only a subset of the space.

pageIds.description: Optional list of specific page IDs to index. If omitted, the entire space is indexed.

projectId.description: The team project ID to associate this Confluence space with

post.description: Submit selected Notion pages for documentation processing. Requires a connected Notion account and a team project.

pageIds.description: List of Notion page IDs to index.

projectId.description: The team project ID to associate these Notion pages with

bearerAuth.description: Get your API key at [genrtl.com/dashboard](https://genrtl.com/dashboard). Treat your API key like a password and store it securely.

QueryParam.name: query
QueryParam.description: User's original question or task - used for intelligent relevance ranking
QueryParam.example: How to manage state with hooks

LibraryIdParam.name: libraryId
LibraryIdParam.description: GenRTL-compatible library ID — the URL path of the library on genrtl.com. Use `/owner/repo` for GitHub repositories, or `/<source>/<id>` for other sources (websites, llms.txt, GitLab/Bitbucket, etc.). Optionally suffix with `/<version>` or `@<version>` to pin a specific version. See [Library ID format](/api-guide#library-id-format).

FastParam.name: fast
FastParam.description: When `true`, skip LLM reranking and return top vector-search results directly. Trades relevance quality for lower latency.

DaysParam.name: days
DaysParam.description: Number of days of daily history to return (1-365). Defaults to 30.

id.description: Library ID — the URL path of the library on genrtl.com. `/owner/repo` for GitHub repositories, or `/<source>/<id>` for other sources (e.g., `/vercel/next.js`, `/websites/uploadcare_com`). See [Library ID format](/api-guide#library-id-format).

results.description: Array of matching libraries ranked by relevance

searchFilterApplied.description: Indicates whether the search results were filtered by the teamspace's public library access settings. When true, some libraries may be excluded from results based on the teamspace's configuration (e.g., only verified libraries, selected libraries, or private repos only).

CodeSnippet.description: A code snippet from library documentation

codeDescription.description: Description of what the code does

isDynamic.description: Whether this snippet was recovered from the dynamic source-code index instead of the primary docs index

sourceFile.description: Repo-relative source file path for dynamic snippets

libraryOwn.description: Rules defined by the library owner

ProjectStats.description: Cumulative request counts for a library, broken down by request surface

page.description: Requests served to the genrtl.com web UI

mcp.description: Requests served via the GenRTL MCP server

cli.description: Requests served to the GenRTL CLI

DailyStatsPoint.description: Per-day request counts for a library (counts *on* this date, not cumulative)

page.description: Requests served to the genrtl.com web UI on this date

txt.description: Plain-text documentation requests on this date

mcp.description: Requests served via the GenRTL MCP server on this date

cli.description: Requests served to the GenRTL CLI on this date

total.description: Sum of all request surfaces on this date (`page + txt + mcp + cli`)

daily.description: Per-day request counts (deltas, not cumulative), ordered from oldest to newest. Days with zero activity are omitted. Up to `days` points — fewer if the library has less history or had idle days in the window.

topics.description: Lifetime topic distribution, ordered by count descending

countries.description: Lifetime country distribution (ISO-2 codes), ordered by count descending

McpClientMetrics.description: MCP client usage breakdown by day

dailyData.description: Per-day MCP client unique-user breakdown, ordered from oldest to newest

McpDailyClientData.description: Per-day MCP client unique users for a library

uniqueUsersByClient.description: Unique user count per MCP client identifier (e.g., `cursor`, `claude-code`, `windsurf`)

totalUniqueUsers.description: Total unique users across all clients for this library on this date

TopicCount.description: Topic with its lifetime request count

count.description: Number of requests that referenced this topic

CountryCount.description: Country with its lifetime request count

count.description: Number of requests originating from this country

AddRepoRequest.description: Request body for adding a Git repository

gitToken.description: Personal access token for private repositories. If not provided, the token from your OAuth connection at https://genrtl.com/add-library is used.

skipVersionFiltering.description: Skip filtering out version-specific documentation pages

AddLibraryResponse.description: Response after successfully submitting a library

libraryName.description: The library identifier assigned — the URL path of the library on genrtl.com. `/owner/repo` for GitHub repositories, or `/<source>/<id>` for other sources (e.g., `/vercel/next.js`, `/websites/uploadcare_com`). See [Library ID format](/api-guide#library-id-format).

SourceTypeStatus.description: Whether a source type is enabled or disabled

enabled.description: Whether this source type is enabled

sourceTypes.description: Access settings for each documentation source type

libraryFilters.description: Library access filters. Mode determines which sub-object is active.

mode.description: Filter mode: 'quality' for threshold-based filtering, 'select' for manual library selection

exceptedLibraries.description: Libraries that bypass all quality filters, blocked list, and source type restrictions

minReferringDomains.description: Minimum number of referring domains required

accessibleLibraryCount.description: Number of public libraries currently accessible under these filters

ListOperation.description: Incremental add/remove operation on a list of library identifiers or domains. Use 'clear' to remove all entries at once.

add.description: Identifiers to add — library paths (e.g. '/org/repo', '/org') or domains (e.g. 'stripe.com')

remove.description: Identifiers to remove — library paths (e.g. '/org/repo', '/org') or domains (e.g. 'stripe.com')

clear.description: Set to true to remove all entries. Cannot be used together with 'add' or 'remove'.

PatchPoliciesRequest.description: Incremental policy update. All fields are optional — only provided fields are modified. At least one of 'sourceTypes' or 'libraryFilters' must be provided.

sourceTypes.description: Enable or disable specific source types. Both can be provided in one request, but the same type cannot appear in both arrays.

maxAgeDays.description: Maximum age in days (null to clear)

minReferringDomains.description: Minimum referring domains threshold (null to clear)

minOrganicTraffic.description: Minimum organic traffic threshold (null to clear)

value.message: Invalid library ID format. Expected: `/owner/repo` for GitHub repositories, or `/<source>/<id>` for other sources (the URL path of the library on genrtl.com)

ForbiddenError.description: Forbidden - Insufficient permissions or plan restrictions

value.message: Access denied: Library /owner/repo is not included in your allowed libraries
Only team owners and admins can add private repositories
Private repositories require a pro plan or team. Upgrade at https://genrtl.com/plans
Library "/owner/repo" not found. Please check the library ID or your access permissions.
Tag "v1.0.0" not found for library "/owner/repo". Available tags: v2.0.0, v1.5.0
Could not fetch documentation snippets from the library.
Team not found or access denied
No libraries found for "nonexistent-lib". Try a different search term.

example.message: An error occurred while processing your request

ServiceUnavailableError.description: Service Unavailable - Search service is temporarily unavailable

RedirectError.description: Moved Permanently - Library has been redirected

example.message: Library /owner/repo has been redirected to this library: /new-owner/new-repo.

UnprocessableEntityError.description: Unprocessable Entity - Library is too large or has no code

value.message: Library /owner/repo is too large to process.
Library /owner/repo has no or too few snippets found in documentation files.

UnauthorizedError.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing API key

example.message: Invalid API key. Please check your API key. API keys should start with 'grtlsk' prefix.
This private repository is already in your team

SpendingLimitError.description: Payment Required - the teamspace's configured monthly spending limit has been reached. A teamspace owner or admin can raise the limit in billing settings, or the cap will reset at the start of the next billing month.

example.message: Monthly spending limit of $5.00 reached for this teamspace. An owner or admin can raise the limit at https://genrtl.com/dashboard/billing, or the cap will reset at the start of next month.

RateLimitError.description: Too Many Requests - Rate limit exceeded

example.message: Rate limit exceeded. Please try again later.

GatewayTimeoutError.description: Gateway Timeout - Processing timed out waiting for logs

example.message: Request timed out. Please try again.
